task_completion.description: Create BORDER, HOLES, and TEXT layers with correct colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Layer List panel in LibreCAD. Verify there are layers named 'BORDER' (White/Black depending on background), 'HOLES' (Yellow), and 'TEXT' (Cyan).

task_completion.description: Draw outer and inner border rectangles on the BORDER layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main drawing canvas. There should be two concentric rectangles (an outer one and an inner one with a small offset) drawn in the BORDER layer color.

task_completion.description: Draw two circular mounting holes on the HOLES layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main drawing canvas. There should be two small circles (yellow) located on the left and right sides, vertically centered within the inner rectangle.

task_completion.description: Add the four required text labels on the TEXT layer
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main drawing canvas. There should be four lines of text (cyan) centered horizontally: 'MODEL: AG-2024', 'SERIAL: _______', 'WEIGHT: 450 kg', and 'MFG DATE: 2024' stacked vertically.
Look at the LibreCAD window title bar, a 'Save As' dialog, or a terminal window showing the file 'nameplate_template.dxf' saved in the ~/Documents/LibreCAD/ directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD application open with visible interaction with its toolbars, layer list, or internal command line, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the CAD software by writing raw DXF code in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing should be constructed visually in LibreCAD. There should be no screenshots of a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing raw DXF syntax.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/nameplate_template.dxf. Layer specifications: BORDER (color index 7 / White), HOLES (color index 2 / Yellow), TEXT (color index 4 / Cyan). Geometry: Outer rectangle from (0,0) to (120,60), inner rectangle from (5,5) to (115,55). Holes: Two circles with radius 2 centered at (10,30) and (110,30). Required text: 'MODEL: AG-2024' (y=45, height 5), 'SERIAL: _______' (y=35, height 4), 'WEIGHT: 450 kg' (y=25, height 4), and 'MFG DATE: 2024' (y=15, height 4).
